evals.prompt: Resolve the URL https://docs.rs/tokio using the do-wdr CLI
evals.expected_output: Markdown documentation extracted from the tokio docs URL via the do-wdr resolve command.

evals.prompt: Use do-wdr to search for information about Python web frameworks
evals.expected_output: Markdown content about Python web frameworks resolved via a query string.
assertions: Output contains markdown content mentioning Python or web frameworks

evals.prompt: Resolve https://github.com/rust-lang/rust with do-wdr and limit output to 2000 characters using --max-chars
evals.expected_output: Truncated markdown from GitHub page, output capped at 2000 characters.
assertions: Output length is under 2500 characters (including CLI overhead)
